title: Add --default-mounts-file hidden flag
body:
The hidden flag is used to override the path of the default mounts file
for testing purposes.
Also modified the secrets pkg to allow for this override to happen.

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, though I would like to see a slightly better comment on WithDefaultMountsFile if you do another push.
